# CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.signOut(previousUser:)

**Case**

A change indicating a sign-out of an iCloud account.

## Declaration

```swift
case signOut(previousUser: CKRecord.ID)
```

## Discussion

After the device signs out of the iCloud account, delete any locally stored data that belongs to that account.

## Account change types

- **CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.signIn(currentUser:)**: A change indicating a sign-in to an iCloud account.
- **CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.switchAccounts(previousUser:currentUser:)**: A change indicating a switch between two iCloud accounts.
